competitors.name: Smiisenses
competitors.positioning: Smiisenses creates clean, cruelty-free candles that bring a sense of warmth, ease, and quiet luxury into everyday living spaces. They offer private label candle manufacturing services for global clients.
competitors.target_audience: Modern homes and individuals seeking luxury fragrance

competitors.name: Candles by Midnight
competitors.positioning: Candles by Midnight focuses on clean-burning, hand-poured soy wax candles blended with natural fragrance oils. They prioritize craftsmanship and performance in their products.
competitors.strengths: High-quality fragrance throw and clean burn

competitors.name: The Uchi Store
competitors.positioning: The Uchi Store offers handcrafted soy wax candle collections with unique fragrances. They emphasize the joy of small everyday practices in life.
competitors.strengths: Unique, handcrafted products with a focus on everyday joy
competitors.target_audience: Individuals seeking luxury, handcrafted home decor items

competitors.name: SORCISH
competitors.positioning: SORCISH delivers luxurious candles that feel premium before and after lighting. They prioritize creating the best overall experience for their customers.
competitors.strengths: Luxurious, high-quality candles with a focus on customer experience
competitors.target_audience: Luxury candle buyers seeking a premium experience

competitors.name: JiViSa
competitors.positioning: JiViSa consistently ranks among the most trusted Indian candle brands, offering natural soy wax candles with a clean burn. They prioritize fragrance quality and customer trust.
competitors.strengths: Trusted brand with natural, clean-burning candles
competitors.target_audience: Individuals seeking trusted, natural candle brands

recommended_skus.name: Fête candle
recommended_skus.description: Joyful floral candle in pastel ceramic jar

recommended_skus.name: Flame candle
recommended_skus.description: Festive citrus woody candle in pink ceramic jar

pricing_analysis.launch_strategy: Enter the market with a competitive pricing strategy, focusing on the premium segment with a hero product priced at ₹4999. Offer a limited-time discount of 15% on the first purchase to incentivize customers and create buzz around the brand.
pricing_analysis.discount_recommendation: Offer a 15% discount on all products for the first week after launch to drive sales and increase customer engagement.

brand_direction.copy_style: Write in a manner that is effortless, yet evocative. Describe the sensory experience of Lumière's handcrafted soy candles, using language that is both poetic and precise. Emphasize the attention to detail and the passion that goes into crafting each candle, while also highlighting the unique benefits of soy wax and the carefully curated fragrances.
key_differentiators: Handcrafted soy candles with unique, complex fragrances
Luxury packaging that is both elegant and sustainable
A focus on creating a sensory experience that elevates the everyday
brand_direction.brand_promise: To illuminate your space and senses with exquisite, handcrafted soy candles that embody the essence of modern, minimal luxury
what_to_avoid: Using overly flashy or attention-seeking language
Focusing too much on price or promotions, rather than the value and quality of the products
Ignoring the importance of sustainability and eco-friendliness in the brand's messaging and practices
